cache.note: 180d requested in brief; cache only ~30d, used full window.

dimensions.vwap_note: 0.0_disabled = filter off, 0.5_default = current live. Intermediate values 0.3/0.7/1.0 not safely expressible without code edit (READ-ONLY).

ship_recommendation.criteria: Δ_pnl ≥ $30 vs baseline_live_config AND WF positive_folds ≥ 3/5

notes: Baseline = current live config (XAUUSD SL_OVERRIDE=0.5, _COMMODITY_AGGRESSIVE trail).
Stale per-symbol overrides (SL_OVERRIDE, TRAIL_OVERRIDE_REGIME, TRAIL_OVERRIDE, DIR_BIAS) were popped during the sweep so params would propagate.
Pullback shim: monkey-patched config.PULLBACK_ATR_RETRACE and config.PULLBACK_MAX_WAIT_BARS.
VWAP shim: only disable supported (NaN out vwap series). Other buffer levels skipped.
Direction bias: injected into v5_backtest._DIR_BIAS_REGIME_STR for trending/ranging cells.

EarlyLossCut bleed in live 30d (-$26.14) — entry-side tuning explored via min_quality, pullback, VWAP, and direction bias. Score-tier exit logic (already deployed) handles post-entry side; this tuner does not modify exit-tier code.
Cache span only 29.7d (180d requested) — results limited accordingly.
